body:
## Review Summary

Clean, correct dedup. Both the code-hash deduplication and the `extend(into_values())` simplifications are semantically preserving and strictly better than what they replace. One minor performance note on the choice of set type (see inline at line 730).

comments.body: nit: `BTreeSet` maintains sorted order, which isn't needed here — a `HashSet` (or `FxHashSet` since `FxHashMap` is already imported) would give O(1) insert/lookup instead of O(log n). Small difference for typical code counts, but since this is a perf PR it seems worth aligning the data structure choice.
